title: MultiNLI - Multi-Genre Natural Language Inference
description: Natural language inference across multiple genres of text, based on the Multi-Genre NLI corpus (Williams et al., NAACL 2018). Annotators classify premise-hypothesis relationships with genre-diverse examples from fiction, government, travel, and more.
citation:

    title = "A Broad-Coverage Challenge Corpus for Sentence Understanding through Inference",
    author = "Williams, Adina  and Nangia, Nikita  and Bowman, Samuel",
    booktitle = "Proceedings of the 2018 Conference of the North {A}merican Chapter of the Association for Computational Linguistics: Human Language Technologies",
    month = jun,
    year = "2018",
    address = "New Orleans, Louisiana",
    publisher = "Association for Computational Linguistics",
    url = "https://aclanthology.org/N18-1101",
    pages = "1112--1122"
}
